resources.string:
Restores Material-style notification icons on OxygenOS 16.
• Status bar: monochrome small icons (auto-tinted light↔dark)
• Notification shade: colored app icons
• AOD: monochrome small icons (white silhouettes)
Apply Material adaptive icons in the status bar
Apply Material adaptive icons in the notification shade
Apply Material adaptive icons on AOD screen
Enable this option to add a setting in each app\'s notification preferences that lets you assign a custom icon to individual notification categories (e.g., messages, calls, reminders)
Enable this option to replace the default icons of some system apps with adaptive icons
Will be implemented in the next release

Applies all pending changes that require a restart of the system interface. SystemUI will be restarted — the screen may briefly go black or the interface may temporarily disappear, then return to normal.
